engineGuide.h2: Nissan NP200 Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan NP200 across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: Renault-sourced 1.5L dCi diesel powering early NP200 imports; reliable workhorse with known injector pump sensitivity on high-mileage commercial use.
compatibleVariants: Base, Pack, Fleet Standard, Commercial Turbo
commonFailures: Injector pump calibration drift - typically 80k-120k miles
EGR cooler clogging on short-journey commercial use
Turbocharger oil seal wear - high-load fleet applications
entries.cta: Get quotes for K9K-732 Nissan NP200 engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: Mid-generation K9K update with revised EGR mapping; improved emissions compliance for UK MoT testing on grey import commercial pickups.
compatibleVariants: Pack, Safety Pack, Fleet Standard, ULEZ Compliant variants
commonFailures: EGR valve sticking - emissions test failures at MoT
Timing belt tensioner wear - preventative replacement advised at 90k miles
DPF regeneration issues on urban commercial routes
entries.cta: Get quotes for K9K-734 Nissan NP200 engine replacement

entries.title: 1.5L Diesel
entries.history: Final-production K9K with enhanced turbo calibration; most sought-after code for late-model NP200 commercial imports requiring UK registration compliance.
compatibleVariants: Safety Pack, High Mileage Commercial, ULEZ Compliant, Fleet Standard
commonFailures: Turbocharger bearing wear - boost loss above 100k miles
Injector seal leakage - fuel dilution of engine oil
Glow plug circuit faults - cold-start difficulties in UK winters
entries.cta: Get quotes for K9K-740 Nissan NP200 engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Petrol
entries.history: Renault-sourced 1.6L 16-valve petrol; dominant engine for early NP200 imports favoured for simplicity and lower initial purchase price among small business operators.
compatibleVariants: Base, Pack, Fleet Standard, South Africa Import variants
commonFailures: Timing belt tensioner failure - catastrophic if ignored, replace at 60k miles
Oil consumption increase - piston ring wear on high-mileage commercial use
Head gasket failure - overheating episodes on load-carrying duties
entries.cta: Get quotes for K4M-700 Nissan NP200 engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Petrol
entries.history: Revised K4M with updated ECU mapping and improved cooling; mid-generation petrol option balancing fuel economy and reliability for UK commercial pickup use.
compatibleVariants: Pack, Safety Pack, ULEZ Compliant, Manual Transmission variants
commonFailures: Ignition coil failure - misfire codes under load
Water pump seal leakage - coolant loss leading to overheating
Variable valve timing solenoid clogging - rough idle, reduced power
entries.cta: Get quotes for K4M-744 Nissan NP200 engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Petrol
entries.history: Final-production K4M with Euro 5 emissions compliance; preferred petrol code for NP200 imports requiring ULEZ exemption and MoT emissions certification in UK urban zones.
compatibleVariants: Safety Pack, ULEZ Compliant, High Mileage Commercial, Fleet Standard
commonFailures: Catalytic converter efficiency loss - MoT emissions test failures
Oil pump wear - low oil pressure warnings at high mileage
Engine mount degradation - drivetrain shudder under commercial load

commonProblems.h2: Nissan NP200 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan NP200's Renault-sourced K4M petrol and K9K diesel engines are robust commercial workhorses, but high-mileage grey imports commonly face timing component wear, injector pump drift, and EGR system clogging. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this decision tool to compare realistic repair costs and determine whether a targeted fix or full replacement offers better value for your commercial pickup.

problems.h4: K4M Timing Belt Tensioner Failure - Why Early NP200 Petrol Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NP200 Base, Pack (2008-2015, K4M-700 & K4M-744)
problems.rootCause: Factory tensioner design lacks sufficient damping; commercial load cycles accelerate wear, leading to belt misalignment and potential catastrophic valve damage.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Preventative Timing Belt Kit Replacement
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full belt, tensioner, idler replacement with updated OEM-spec components
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before noise/vibration; prevents catastrophic failure

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Cylinder Head Inspection + Belt Kit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Belt kit plus valve clearance check, compression test, head gasket assessment
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable if early warning signs present; confirms no valve damage occurred

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded tensioner, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if valve damage confirmed or engine exceeds 90k miles

problems.recommendation: On a Nissan NP200 worth £3,500-£6,500, preventative belt replacement at 55k miles is the smart commercial investment. If you hear rattling or have missed the service interval, budget for a rebuilt unit-valve damage repair often exceeds replacement cost.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K4M engine prices for your Nissan NP200

problems.h4: K9K Injector Pump Calibration Drift - Why NP200 Diesel Power Drops
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NP200 Base, Pack, Safety Pack (2008-2023, K9K-732/734/740)
problems.rootCause: High-pressure pump internal wear reduces fuel delivery precision; commercial stop-start duty accelerates component fatigue, causing black smoke, power loss, and failed MoT emissions tests.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Specialist dyno calibration, injector leak-off test, ECU adaptation reset
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for early-stage drift; requires specialist diagnostic equipment

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Pump rebuild with new internals, matched injector set, full system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for confirmed wear; restores performance but doesn't address block health

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded pump, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best long-term value for commercial fleets; eliminates recurring injector concerns

problems.recommendation: For a commercial NP200 used daily, injector pump calibration is worth attempting if mileage is under 85k. Beyond that, a rebuilt K9K with upgraded pump components delivers better uptime certainty and MoT compliance assurance.
problems.cta: Get quotes for K9K diesel engine replacement for your Nissan NP200

problems.h4: K9K EGR Cooler Clogging - Why NP200 Diesel Fails MoT Emissions
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NP200 Pack, Safety Pack (2013-2023, K9K-734/740)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation cooler accumulates carbon deposits from commercial short-journey use; restricted flow triggers fault codes, reduced power, and excessive smoke at MoT testing.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - EGR Valve Clean + System Reset
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Ultrasonic EGR clean, intake manifold inspection, ECU fault code reset
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix for mild clogging; may recur within 12-18 months on commercial use

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - EGR Cooler Replacement + DPF Check
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New cooler assembly, DPF pressure test, full emissions system diagnostic
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for confirmed cooler failure; addresses immediate MoT compliance

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K9K with EGR Delete Option
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit; optional EGR blanking kit for off-road commercial use only
repairOptions.longevity: Best for fleet operators prioritising uptime; note: EGR modifications affect road legality

problems.recommendation: If your NP200 is used for urban commercial routes, EGR cleaning is a cost-effective first step. For high-mileage vehicles approaching MoT, a rebuilt engine with verified emissions compliance offers stronger long-term value and reduces repeat workshop visits.
problems.cta: Compare Nissan NP200 diesel engine prices with EGR compliance verification

problems.h4: K4M Oil Consumption Increase - Why NP200 Petrol Engines Burn Oil
problems.rootCause: Piston ring land wear and valve stem seal hardening allow oil into combustion chambers; commercial load cycles and infrequent oil changes accelerate degradation on grey imports.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Valve stem seals, PCV valve, spark plugs, synthetic oil flush
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses mild consumption; suitable if compression tests are healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Ring replacement via oil pan removal, bore inspection, updated ring set
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is sound; reduces consumption but doesn't address head wear

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K4M with Updated Rings
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with revised piston rings, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for commercial pickups exceeding 95k miles; eliminates recurring oil top-ups

problems.recommendation: For an NP200 used commercially, monitor oil consumption closely after 75k miles. If topping up exceeds 1L per 1,000 miles, a rebuilt engine with updated components delivers better cost-per-mile certainty than repeated top-end repairs.
problems.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt K4M engines with upgraded piston rings for your Nissan NP200

problems.h4: K9K Turbocharger Bearing Wear - Why NP200 Diesel Loses Boost
problems.affectedModels: Nissan NP200 Commercial Turbo, Safety Pack (2010-2023, K9K-732/740 turbo variants)
problems.rootCause: Turbo shaft bearings wear from commercial high-load operation and infrequent oil changes; oil coking accelerates failure, causing boost loss, excessive smoke, and potential engine damage from oil starvation.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Turbo Actuator Calibration + Oil Service
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Actuator reset, full synthetic oil change, oil feed line inspection
repairOptions.longevity: Only suitable for early warning signs; does not address internal bearing wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Turbo rebuild with new bearings/seals, balance test, oil system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Effective for confirmed turbo failure; requires careful oil system preparation

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K9K with Upgraded Turbo
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt unit with upgraded turbo, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best long-term solution for commercial fleets; eliminates recurring turbo concerns

problems.recommendation: Turbo failure on a commercial NP200 is rarely isolated-oil contamination often affects the wider engine. For vehicles over 100k miles, a rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo components delivers superior commercial uptime and reduces the risk of repeat failures.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K9K turbo diesel engine prices for your Nissan NP200

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan NP200
finalCta.paragraph: The Nissan NP200's commercial reliability depends on proactive engine management. EngineMarket connects you with UK specialists who understand grey import commercial pickups, offering rebuilt engines with upgraded components that address the K4M's timing tensioner weakness and the K9K's injector pump sensitivity. Every quote includes supply & fit options, nationwide delivery, and a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty-so you can get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan NP200 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan NP200 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

Timing belt tensioner failure causing catastrophic valve damage if ignored
Oil consumption increase from piston ring wear on high-mileage use
Lower initial purchase price appealing to budget-conscious fleet operators

engineYears.h2: Nissan NP200 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the NP200's 2008-2023 production timeline, organised so UK commercial owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: First UK grey import NP200 models introduced with Renault-sourced K4M petrol and K9K diesel engines, establishing the commercial pickup's reputation for simple, load-capable design.
keyChanges: Initial South African-market NP200 imports launched in UK commercial sector
K4M-700 petrol and K9K-732 diesel established as baseline powerplants
Manual transmission only; no automatic option offered for grey imports
knownFor: Simple mechanical design appealing to small business operators
Timing belt tensioner weakness on K4M requiring preventative replacement
Injector pump sensitivity on K9K at high commercial mileage
Strong parts interchangeability with Renault Kangoo platform
years.cta: Get quotes for 2008-2012 Nissan NP200 replacement engines
years.ticker: NP200 Base engine replacement • K4M timing belt kit • K9K injector pump calibration

years.description: Revised NP200 models introduced updated K4M-744 and K9K-734 engines with improved ECU mapping and emissions compliance for stricter UK MoT testing requirements.
keyChanges: Updated engine codes with revised EGR and fuel mapping for emissions compliance
Safety Pack trim introduced with enhanced commercial equipment specification
Revised cooling system components addressing early overheating reports
knownFor: Improved MoT emissions performance on updated K9K-734 diesel
Persistent oil consumption concerns on high-mileage K4M petrol units
EGR valve sticking issues emerging on urban commercial duty cycles
Better parts availability as import volumes increased in UK market
years.ticker: NP200 Pack engine replacement • K9K EGR cleaner • K4M oil consumption fix

years.description: Late-model NP200 imports featured Euro 5-compliant K4M-745 and K9K-740 engines, targeting ULEZ exemption and enhanced commercial durability for UK urban operations.
keyChanges: Euro 5 emissions compliance achieved via revised catalytic converters and DPF systems
ULEZ exemption certification available for qualifying late-model imports
Final production updates to turbocharger and injector specifications
knownFor: ULEZ exemption making late-model imports attractive for London commercial use
Turbocharger bearing wear emerging on high-mileage K9K-740 units
Catalytic converter efficiency concerns affecting MoT emissions tests
Highest resale values among grey import NP200 variants in UK commercial market

years.ticker: NP200 Safety Pack engine • K9K turbo rebuild • ULEZ compliance verification

faq.h2: Nissan NP200 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Nissan NP200 engine replacement cost in the UK for grey import commercial pickups?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt engine costs range from £850-£2,400 supply-only, depending on engine code (K4M petrol or K9K diesel), variant, and commercial specification. Supply & fit adds £450-£850 labour.
keyPoints: K4M petrol rebuilt units typically £850-£2,100 supply-only
K9K diesel rebuilt units typically £950-£2,400 supply-only
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£850 depending on location
Warranty terms and MoT compliance documentation included
items.cta: Compare Nissan NP200 engine prices from vetted UK specialists

items.question: What engine codes are compatible with my imported Nissan NP200 commercial pickup in the UK?
items.answer: The NP200 uses Renault-sourced K4M (1.6L petrol) or K9K (1.5L diesel) codes. Verify your exact code via DVLA registration check or engine block stamping before ordering replacement.
keyPoints: Petrol codes: K4M-700, K4M-744, K4M-745
Diesel codes: K9K-732, K9K-734, K9K-740
DVLA registration lookup confirms exact variant and code
Cross-variant compatibility exists within same fuel type
items.cta: Get your Nissan NP200 engine code verified free via registration

items.question: How long does it take to replace a Nissan NP200 commercial pickup engine in the UK for grey imports?
items.answer: Typical replacement takes 2-4 days for supply-only collection, or 3-5 days including specialist fitting, ECU adaptation and MoT emissions verification for commercial imports.
keyPoints: Supply-only engines dispatched within 24-48 hours of order
Specialist fitting requires 1-2 additional workshop days
ECU adaptation and immobiliser sync add half-day
MoT emissions testing scheduled post-installation
items.cta: Find Nissan NP200 supply & fit specialists with fast turnaround

items.question: Does a replacement Nissan NP200 commercial pickup engine come with a warranty for UK grey imports?
items.answer: Yes-every engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with optional 24-month upgrades available for commercial fleet contracts.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
24-month options available for fleet standardisation contracts
MoT compliance documentation included with warranty
items.cta: Compare Nissan NP200 engine warranty terms from UK suppliers

items.question: Can I fit a Nissan NP200 commercial pickup engine myself or do I need an import commercial specialist in the UK?
items.answer: While mechanically possible for experienced DIYers, grey import NP200 engines require ECU pinout matching and immobiliser sync best handled by import commercial specialists to ensure MoT compliance.
keyPoints: ECU adaptation requires specialist diagnostic equipment
Immobiliser sync critical for vehicle security and starting
MoT emissions certification needs specialist verification
Supply-only option available if you have qualified workshop access
items.cta: View Nissan NP200 supply-only vs supply & fit options

items.question: Will a replacement engine affect my imported Nissan NP200 commercial pickup insurance in the UK?
items.answer: Yes-you must notify your insurer of any engine replacement. Most providers require documentation of the rebuilt unit's warranty and MoT compliance to maintain coverage on grey import commercial vehicles.
keyPoints: Insurers require declaration of engine replacement within 14 days
Rebuilt engine warranty documentation supports premium calculation
MoT emissions certificate required for policy validation
DVLA notification needed if engine code changes
items.cta: Get Nissan NP200 engine replacement documentation for insurance

items.question: How do I know if my imported Nissan NP200 commercial pickup needs a full engine replacement or just a repair in the UK?
items.answer: Compression testing, leak-down analysis and diagnostic fault codes determine severity. If valve damage, piston scoring or bearing failure is confirmed, replacement typically offers better commercial uptime value.
keyPoints: Compression below 120 PSI on multiple cylinders indicates replacement
Metallic knocking or blue smoke suggests internal damage
Diagnostic codes P0087/P0088 often signal injector pump failure
Repair costs exceeding 60% of rebuilt unit price favour replacement
items.cta: Get a free Nissan NP200 engine assessment from UK specialists

items.question: Are used Nissan NP200 commercial pickup engines reliable for UK grey imports?
items.answer: Used engines can be reliable if sourced from low-mileage imports with documented service history, but carry higher risk than rebuilt units for commercial operators prioritising uptime and MoT compliance.
keyPoints: Request compression and leak-down test reports pre-purchase
Verify mileage via South African import documentation
Ensure DVLA-compatible paperwork is included
Budget for potential ancillary component replacement post-install
items.cta: Check verified low-mileage used Nissan NP200 engine availability

items.question: What is the difference between reconditioned, rebuilt, and remanufactured Nissan NP200 commercial pickup engines for UK imports?
items.answer: Reconditioned = cleaned/inspected with worn parts replaced; Rebuilt = comprehensive overhaul with upgraded failure-point components; Remanufactured = zero-hour factory-spec rebuild with every part renewed.
keyPoints: Reconditioned: cost-effective, suitable for lower-mileage commercial use
Rebuilt: best value, addresses known K4M/K9K failure patterns
Remanufactured: premium option for fleet standardisation contracts
All three include minimum 12-month warranty through our network
items.cta: Compare Nissan NP200 engine quality tiers and pricing

items.question: How do I prepare my imported Nissan NP200 commercial pickup for engine replacement in the UK?
items.answer: Drain fluids, disconnect battery, remove ancillary components per workshop manual, and ensure DVLA registration documents are accessible for specialist verification during the replacement process.
keyPoints: Drain engine oil and coolant to reduce weight for transport
Photograph wiring harness routing for reinstallation reference
Gather import documentation for DVLA compliance verification
Confirm workshop has lift access for commercial pickup height
items.cta: Download Nissan NP200 engine replacement preparation checklist
